name: Sweet Potato Pancakes-2
recipeIngredient: 3 Medium Sweet Potatoes, peeled and grated
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the egg with the potatoes and onions.
2. Combine the dry ingredients separately.
3. Add the dry mixture to the potato-onion mixture.
4. Scoop the batter onto a heated, nonstick skillet coated lightly with oil using large tablespoons.
5. Cook for 4 minutes on each side or until cooked through.
6. Serve with applesauce, apple butter, or sour cream and chives.
Source: Pick of the Day, Curtis Aikens, TVFN.
